name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝑰 𝒕𝒉𝒐𝒖𝒈𝒉𝒕 𝑰'𝒅 𝒏𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒓 𝒔𝒆𝒆 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒂𝒈𝒂𝒊𝒏, 𝒔𝒘𝒆𝒆𝒕𝒏𝒆𝒔𝒔."   |
where Gojo can't help but cry while making love to you.



______________


I had a random spurt of inspiration and HAD to write this asap.

I was looking through some of my old bots on poe and realised I used to write some about the storyline (i.e., Gojo getting sealed), so I just freshened it up for reupload here.

Enjoy 🫶🏼
